info.title: EasyPlan Backend API
info.description: Intent-driven native task board API with JWT auth, HITL LangGraph checkpoints, and Async Queue SSE event streams.

parameters.name: X-User-Timezone

schema.description: IANA timezone name, for example Asia/Shanghai.
schema.title: X-User-Timezone

parameters.description: IANA timezone name, for example Asia/Shanghai.

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream. Events include reasoning, checkpoint, plan_ready, done, snapshot_required, and agent_error. Every event payload contains thread_id, run_type, request_id, and state_version. Every stream requires the matching request_id. The agent_error event payload also contains code and message.
